result: invD tracks T_relax strongly; log(invD) ranks first among tested single predictors of log(A).

result: invD_chosen favored globally on numeric + high-T shape metrics.

notes: task formula aligns with denominator reading.

question: Q5_best_empirical_predictor
result: Linear invD beats linear T and linear Xeff on LOOCV_RMSE in A space for both targets.

question: Q5_scaling_organizer
result: invD_power best LOOCV among AX-18C scaling templates; beats T_linear.

question: Q6_turnover_highT
result: A peaks ~29 K; invD peak aligns; Xeff peak ~25 K; invD wins window composites.

question: Q7_simple_T_baselines
result: Best simple T baseline among listed T-only models: T_linear.
caveat: AOBS/ASVD may still be T-reparameterized in broader sense per 18C flags

question: Q8_empirical_power_law
result: T_power and Xeff_power do not beat T_linear; invD_power does; no physical law.

question: Q9_invD_beyond_T
result: After T_relax_raw best proxy; invD improves LOOCV beyond T alone; Xeff does not on this diagnostic.

question: Q10_allowed_manuscript_claim
